## Summary

-

## Verification

- [ ] `bun run build`
- [ ] `bun run check:boundaries`
- [ ] `bun run check:agent-spec`
- [ ] `bun run check:skills`
- [ ] `bun run check:bundled-skills`
- [ ] `bun run test`
- [ ] Install smoke, when install/release paths changed

## Release Impact

- [ ] No version or release behavior change
- [ ] Version bump included, if behavior changed
- [ ] Release notes/update path considered, if release-facing behavior changed
